evidence: "These are the films that inspired the video game Cuphead... artistry and imagination in 1930s animation."
"I am sick and tired of Netflix and Prime green lighting pieces of crap like this that should be relegated to a corny youtube channel."
"I do not want to hear anal retentive animation 'experts' using the freeze frame button and complaining."
"The second commentary is the funniest commentary I’ve ever heard."
"Watching this character evolve chronologically with the best animation directors is a huge treat."
"The improvements compared to the previous DVD release are HUGE."
"I could care less about the episodes of the animated series... My favorite aspect of this release is seeing the detail on the stop-motion puppets, the surreal set design, and Oscar winning makeup."
"Buy all Thunderbean, Steve Stanchfield can do no wrong."
"If you liked volumes 1 & 2, here's more weird, rare gold."
"The greatest movie about Mark Twain and one of the best animated films of all time."
"I give the blu-ray version of Beetlejuice five stars for the picture and sound quality alone."
"I thought the WWII shorts would be a drag, but Clampett's 'Russian Rhapsody' has become one of my favorites."

summary: The user has a strong preference for animation and appreciates high-quality production values, particularly in restoration work. They enjoy simple narratives and slow pacing, valuing emotional resonance and sensory experiences in their viewing choices.
